message:
docs(setup): align wizard help text with actual ~/.cache/cass/setup_state.json path

src/sources/setup.rs::SetupState::path() resolves via dirs::cache_dir(),
which is ~/.cache on Linux. The wizard's rustdoc + --help output and
two --robot-help lines all advertised ~/.config/cass/setup_state.json
instead, so operators pointed to ~/.config would never find their
saved state. README (line 444) already states ~/.cache correctly;
this aligns the CLI help text with the code and the README.

Four call sites updated via replace-all.

Reality-check finding (alongside filed bead coding_agent_session_search-oy4fd
for the separate README overclaim about golden-pinned JSON surfaces).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
